prompt: A cinematic black-and-white portrait of a solitary cowboy standing and walking directly toward the camera on a flooded dirt road in open countryside during heavy rain. He is centered in the frame, full body visible, wearing a dark wide-brimmed cowboy hat, a long soaked leather trench coat layered over dark clothes, and heavy boots splashing through shallow water. His face is completely obscured by a smooth rectangular blur or censor block, creating an anonymous, unsettling presence. To the left side of the road stands 1 simple wooden cross planted in the grass. The background is a bleak flat landscape with low grasses, a winding muddy track disappearing into the distance, and dramatic storm clouds hanging low across the sky. Emphasize wet textures, reflective puddles, raindrops streaking downward, moody contrast, gritty realism, and a stark ominous atmosphere like a neo-western thriller still. Shot straight-on at eye level with symmetrical composition, centered subject, slight depth haze in the distance, high detail, monochrome, photorealistic.
